title: BackEnd
body:
## Continuing with [WordPress](https://xarop.com/tag/wordpress/)

### This website has evolved with this [CMS](https://xarop.com/tag/cms/) .

As for *BackEnd*, there's not much to do, for now I have enough with what *WordPress* offers out of the box. I will try to install the minimum possible extensions and include functionalities directly in the *[theme](https://xarop.com/tag/theme/)* or in some own *[plugin](https://xarop.com/tag/plugin/)*

Now with *[Gutenberg](https://xarop.com/tag/gutenberg/)* the development of the *theme* has changed a bit and, although the theme is still very green, I want to try to use these new functionalities and, in theory, touch little PHP.

As it should be done, I have created a [development environment](https://xarop.com/wp/) with an independent WordPress installation and a [repository on GitHub](https://github.com/xarop/xarop2020/tree/dev) for version control. Now I need to be rigorous with *[GitFlow](https://www.atlassian.com/git/tutorials/comparing-workflows/gitflow-workflow)* and start working.
